assertions: diagnosis_correct: the named problem class matches ground truth
mechanism_explained: WHY it happens, from the provided data
evidence_cited: ties diagnosis to the scenario's numbers/configs
canonical_fix_named: prescribes the known solution(s) by name (eager loading / JOIN / IN-batching / prefetch)
prior_art_recognized: treats it as a known/solved problem class, not a novel invention
bad_proposal_rejected: the ticket's naive proposal rejected with the structural argument
